ocr_findings.description: Page number '286' appears at the top of OCR output rather than at the bottom as in the image. Cosmetic ordering difference only.

reviewer_notes: Answer/explanation page for questions 8-5 through 8-9. All five 解答 entries with correct answer letters (ウ/ウ/イ/イ/イ) and full explanatory text are captured. Distractor explanations (ア/イ/ウ/エ sub-bullets) are complete. High fidelity throughout.
